content.code:
# Evidence: rag-production-defense-37b33i
# Competency: rag-production-defense.
# Case 4348: a public-benefits policy change.
# Operating constraint: keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def evidence_rag_production_defense_37b33i(unit: bool = True, retrieval_eval: bool = True, generation_eval: bool = True, security: bool = True, accessibility: bool = True, load: bool = True, rollback: bool = True, recovery: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_37b33i = "37b33i-i33b73-4348"
    assert evidence_variant_37b33i
    evidence_axes_37b33i = (
        "corpus37b33i",
        "queryi33b73",
        "tenant4348",
        "index37b33i4348",
        "prompti33b734348",
        "evaluation434837b33i",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_37b33i)) == 6
    gates = (unit, retrieval_eval, generation_eval, security, accessibility, load, rollback, recovery)
    passed = sum(1 for gate in gates if gate)
    if not unit or not retrieval_eval:
        return False, passed, "deterministic-gates"
    if not generation_eval or not security or not accessibility:
        return False, passed, "quality-safety-gates"
    if not load or not rollback or not recovery:
        return False, passed, "production-gates"
    assert passed == len(gates)
    return True, passed, "production-defense"
